title: Goat Horn Trumpet
description: Replaces the goat horn texture with a realistic brass trumpet.
body:
Ever thought the goat horn looked a little... underwhelming? Same.
This resource pack replaces the default goat horn texture with a sleek, golden brass trumpet. Now when you're blasting those horn calls across the mountains, you'll actually look like a proper musician instead of someone holding a chunk of keratin.

Why?
Because goat horns deserve better. Because trumpets are cool. Because why not?

![Trumpet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5513e893def190630d569131963101605f73448.png)
